text: Iteration 1 fixed 3 audit items: EventSeriesForm disabled during submission, BlogPreview dark variant, OpportunityForm error banner token migration. However, none of the 17 issues from the prior review were addressed: the BadgeApprovalQueue stale closure (important), 6 important missing focus rings / motion-safe prefixes, and 9 minor issues remain. The existing changes are correct with no regressions, but the PR is not yet ready to merge.

reasoning: All 17 prior issues remain unaddressed: 1 important stale-closure, 6 important accessibility gaps, and 9 minor issues. All are straightforward fixes with low regression risk.

message: Correctly added `disabled={isSubmitting}` to all form fields via the `field()` helper and direct attributes — prevents user edits during submission.
Added `dark:bg-brand-surface/30` to section background — fixes the missing dark mode variant from the original audit.
Replaced hardcoded red color classes with brand tokens (`bg-brand-error/10`, `border-brand-error/20`, `text-brand-error`) — follows theme token conventions.
The `field()` helper explicitly handles `disabled` via `extra?.disabled ?? false`, making it safe to pass `disabled: isSubmitting` through the options object.

Stale closure: `onSuccess` references `reviewMutation.variables?.action` instead of using the `variables` parameter from the mutation callback. In concurrent React, the mutation variables may be stale. The toast message (`approved` vs `rejected`) could display incorrectly under rapid successive mutations.
Dropdown menu (`role="menu"`) has no keyboard navigation. WCAG 4.1.2 requires ArrowUp/ArrowDown/Home/End navigation for menu role. Screen reader and keyboard-only users cannot navigate menu items.
suggestion: Add `onKeyDown` handler on the menu container for ArrowUp/ArrowDown/Home/End, or use an accessible menu library.

message: Recurring toggle (both instances at lines 99 and 146) has `transition-colors duration-200` and `transition-transform duration-200` without `motion-safe:` prefix. Does not respect `prefers-reduced-motion`.
suggestion: Prefix transition classes with `motion-safe:` on both toggle containers (lines 99, 146) and knob elements (lines 103, 150).

message: Frequency selection buttons (DAILY/WEEKLY/MONTHLY/CUSTOM) lack `focus-visible:ring` for keyboard focus indication.
suggestion: Add `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-primary focus-visible:outline-none` to the frequency button className.

message: Day-of-week selection buttons (Sun-Sat) lack `focus-visible:ring` for keyboard focus indication.
suggestion: Add `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-primary focus-visible:outline-none` to the day-of-week button className.

message: Close button (X icon) is missing `focus-visible:ring`. Keyboard users navigating via Tab get no branded focus indicator.
suggestion: Add `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-primary focus-visible:outline-none` to the close button className.

message: Add certification button lacks `focus-visible:ring` for keyboard focus indication.
suggestion: Add `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-primary focus-visible:outline-none` to the button className.

message: Error state uses hardcoded red colors (`bg-red-100`, `text-red-500`, `text-red-600`) instead of brand tokens. The PR added `dark:` variants but didn't migrate to theme tokens.
suggestion: Replace `bg-red-100 dark:bg-red-950/30` with `bg-brand-error/10`, `text-red-500 dark:text-red-400` with `text-brand-error`, `text-red-600 dark:text-red-400` with `text-brand-error/80`.

message: Action column `<th>` is missing `scope="col"`. The other five header cells were fixed but this one was overlooked, creating inconsistency for screen readers.
suggestion: Add `scope="col"` to the action column's `<th>` element.

message: Dismiss button uses `focus-visible:ring-white/50`. Against the brand-primary/90 gradient background, white/50 provides ~2.5:1 contrast, below WCAG 2.1 SC 1.4.11 minimum of 3:1 for focus indicators.
`focus-visible:rounded` applies default border-radius, while sibling elements use branded rounded values. Inconsistent visual appearance.

Remote toggle switch has `focus-visible:ring-2` but is missing `focus-visible:outline-none`. The element with `tabIndex={0}` will show default browser outline alongside the ring, creating a double focus indicator.
suggestion: Add `focus-visible:outline-none` to match other fixed elements in the same file.

message: `role="form"` is applied to a wrapper `<div>` that contains a native `<form>` element. This creates a redundant/confusing landmark for screen readers, since the `<form>` element already has an implicit `form` role.
suggestion: Either remove `role="form"` from the div or move it to the `<form>` element.

message: Uses `text-destructive` (shadcn/ui token) for upload error, while rest of codebase (and this PR's changes) consistently uses `text-brand-error`. Pre-existing inconsistency.

Backdrop div has `role="button"` with `tabIndex={-1}`. The `role="button"` makes it discoverable via screen reader element lists, but `tabIndex={-1}` prevents keyboard focus, making the `onKeyDown` handler unreachable for keyboard-only users. Furthermore, the Escape handler (line 22-27) and close button already handle dismissal, making the backdrop's keyboard handler redundant.
suggestion: Remove `role="button"`, `tabIndex={-1}`, and the backdrop `onKeyDown` handler since dismissal is handled by the Escape listener and close button.

message: Install button uses `focus-visible:ring-white/50` on a white (`bg-white hover:bg-white/90`) button background. White-on-white ring is invisible for normal-vision users and only partially visible (~2.5:1) against the gradient backdrop.
suggestion: Use `focus-visible:ring-brand-primary` or `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-2` for the install button.

message: Spinner uses `border-current/30 border-t-current`. On the `cta` variant (`bg-brand-cta text-white`), the spinner is white-on-white with partial transparency, rendering it nearly invisible when stationary. Spinning reveals it but it remains low-contrast.
suggestion: Consider a fixed contrast color combination for the spinner, e.g., `border-white/30 border-t-white` for all variants on dark backgrounds.
